title: I need to create a new board that duplicates an existing board but with only certain columns
excerpt:
I have board A that is my working board. I need to create board B that is exactly like board A, pulls updated information from board A, but only has a limited number of the columns that board A has. 
I need the ‘item’ co…

posts.author: tanyaOnori (Tanya A Onori)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have board A that is my working board. I need to create board B that is exactly like board A, pulls updated information from board A, but only has a limited number of the columns that board A has.

I need the ‘item’ column on board A to appear on board B when a status on board A is set to a specific value.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @tanyaOnori - you can use a connect boards column in concert with mirror columns to replicate the data across two boards.

Please note, for this type of solution users of Board B would need access to Board A to view the data. If this is not suitable, I would look at an app like VLOOKUP Auto-Link to sync up multiple boards.

Hope this helps and feel free to reach out anytime for additional assistance.
Mark

Green Llamas

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @tanyaOnori ,

The Duplicates and Uniques app can do exactly that. I have create a quick demo on how.

If you need any help with the app, you can always reach out at support@kolaai.com
